description: In the directory /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/, generate a SUMO polygons file named pasubio_polygons.add.xml from the OSM extract pasubio_area.osm. Ensure the polygons are projected according to the pasubio_buslanes.net.xml network and use the default OSM typemap located at $SUMO_HOME/data/typemap/osmPolyconvert.typ.xml. Create a new simulation configuration file named run_enriched.sumocfg, based on run.sumocfg, that incorporates the new polygons file into the simulation's additional files.
